name: @supermajia/majia-guanyuan
description: Tool-agnostic Agent Skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Five capabilities — Part A data query & card creation / Part B ETL governance & write (incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite + ExecPlan) / Part C custom chart HTML+CSS+JS injection & debugging / Part C-12 HTML application-style dashboard (SDK + DATA_GRID dataView + descriptor-level selector linkage patch) / Part D V7 Page/Card publish pipeline + 3-state hard rules (guanvis-skill one-shot publish + CSV three-state + Spark Chinese-CTE-alias trap + ETL update dsId injection). Compatible with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes (gbrain). V2.1.7 (2026-05-21) is a routing/triggering refresh — frontmatter description extended to cover Part D + restaurant-BI-formulas trigger keywords (v7 BI / 60004 / guanvis-skill / CSV three-state / Spark CTE Chinese alias / 1012 same-name file / 复购率 / 客单价 / RFM / DWD wide-table / 财务双源对账 / AC / ADS / Comp); Part D gets its own stub section in SKILL.md body for symmetry with Part C-12; three version-string drifts fixed. V2.1.6: NEW references/v7-page-card-publish-pipeline.md (~340 lines) — 12 pitfalls from a 20-table + 17-ETL + 6-HTML-dashboard end-to-end demo. V2.1.5: NEW references/restaurant-bi-formulas/ — fully-anonymized restaurant-chain BI formula playbook (10 markdown files, 2881 lines) distilled from two production analyst tenures: 60+ SQL snippets + 6 ETL engineering patterns + 39 production ETL catalog index. V2.1.4: command surface synced with @guandata/guancli 1.0.21 — `metric query` generalized-query flags, `card preview -f excel` export, cleaner runtime error output. V2.1.1: HTML application-style dashboard generation (Part C-12). V2.1.0: @guandata/guanvis-skill@0.1.13 internal-Nexus rollout. V2.0.0: renamed from guanyuan-majia. V1.5.0: progressive-disclosure architecture saves ~1.2万 tokens per invocation.
author: maojiebc
